name: notes
description: Add a full-page, pressure-sensitive ink canvas for handwriting / sketching lessons on a stylus device. Ships an author-editable <Notebook> component (Canvas + PointerEvents, localStorage-persisted) into src/lesson/notes — no new npm dependencies.

skill.loadWhen: the lesson is handwriting/sketch-driven on a stylus device — a full-page ink notebook the learner writes or draws in
